reasoning: On the forecast date of 2025-08-17, the most recent Wikipedia revision (from July 26) showed the July 1 FIDE ratings, placing Koneru Humpy at #5. Consequently, the resolution requirement to be "as high or higher" means she must maintain a ranking of 5 or better (i.e., 1 through 5). However, a ChessBase India article dated August 2 confirmed that the official August 1 FIDE rating list places Humpy at #6 worldwide. Meanwhile, she participated in the FIDE Women's World Cup throughout late July, where she was the rating favorite but finished runner-up to the significantly lower-rated Divya Deshmukh (~2463). This underperformance relative to her 2536 rating ensures she lost active rating points, making an immediate bounce back to the top 5 highly unlikely in September or November. Once the Wikipedia page is updated, her ranking will be parsed as 6 (or worse), which fails the <=5 condition. Under the constraint that uncertainty must approach 0.5 for distant dates, my probabilities regress upward from a confident NO in August/September to a more uncertain NO in February.
